targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS trades FROM orders WHERE status = 'filled' AND filled_at >= CURRENT_DATE

SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN outcome = 'win' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN outcome IN ('win','loss') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1) AS win_rate FROM orders WHERE filled_at >= CURRENT_DATE

SELECT ROUND((AVG(ABS(fill_price - limit_price)) * 100)::numeric, 2) AS avg_slippage_cents FROM orders WHERE status = 'filled' AND fill_price IS NOT NULL AND limit_price IS NOT NULL AND filled_at >= CURRENT_DATE
SELECT ROUND(AVG(latency_ms)::numeric, 1) AS avg_latency FROM orders WHERE status = 'filled' AND latency_ms IS NOT NULL AND filled_at >= CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pnl_cents), 0) / 100.0 AS pnl_dollars FROM orders WHERE pnl_cents IS NOT NULL AND settled_at >= CURRENT_DATE

SELECT CASE WHEN ticker LIKE 'KXBTC%' THEN 'BTC' WHEN ticker LIKE 'KXETH%' THEN 'ETH' WHEN ticker LIKE 'KXSOL%' THEN 'SOL' WHEN ticker LIKE 'KXXRP%' THEN 'XRP' WHEN ticker LIKE 'KXDOGE%' OR ticker LIKE 'KXDOG%' THEN 'DOGE' ELSE 'Weather' END AS asset, COUNT(*) AS trades FROM orders WHERE status = 'filled' AND filled_at >= CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY trades DESC
SELECT filled_at AS time, fill_price FROM orders WHERE $__timeFilter(filled_at) AND status = 'filled' AND fill_price IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1
SELECT o.filled_at AS time, s.model_prob FROM orders o JOIN signals s ON o.signal_id = s.id WHERE $__timeFilter(o.filled_at) AND o.status = 'filled' AND s.model_prob IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroup(captured_at, '1m') AS time, AVG(spread) AS avg_spread FROM market_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(captured_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroup(captured_at, '1m') AS time, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY spread) AS p95_spread FROM market_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(captured_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT filled_at AS time, (fill_price - limit_price) * 100 AS slippage_cents FROM orders WHERE $__timeFilter(filled_at) AND status = 'filled' AND fill_price IS NOT NULL AND limit_price IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

SELECT CASE WHEN latency_ms < 50 THEN '0-50' WHEN latency_ms < 100 THEN '50-100' WHEN latency_ms < 200 THEN '100-200' WHEN latency_ms < 500 THEN '200-500' WHEN latency_ms < 1000 THEN '500-1000' ELSE '1000+' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS count FROM orders WHERE $__timeFilter(filled_at) AND status = 'filled' AND latency_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY MIN(latency_ms)

SELECT $__timeGroup(o.filled_at, '1h') AS time, AVG(s.edge) AS avg_expected_edge FROM orders o JOIN signals s ON o.signal_id = s.id WHERE $__timeFilter(o.filled_at) AND o.status = 'filled' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroup(filled_at, '1h') AS time, AVG(pnl_cents) / 100.0 AS avg_realized_pnl FROM orders WHERE $__timeFilter(filled_at) AND status = 'filled' AND pnl_cents IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT CASE WHEN ticker LIKE 'KXBTC%' THEN 'BTC' WHEN ticker LIKE 'KXETH%' THEN 'ETH' WHEN ticker LIKE 'KXSOL%' THEN 'SOL' WHEN ticker LIKE 'KXXRP%' THEN 'XRP' WHEN ticker LIKE 'KXDOGE%' OR ticker LIKE 'KXDOG%' THEN 'DOGE' ELSE 'Weather' END AS asset, COALESCE(SUM(pnl_cents), 0) / 100.0 AS pnl_dollars, COUNT(*) AS trades, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN outcome = 'win' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN outcome IN ('win','loss') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1) AS win_pct FROM orders WHERE $__timeFilter(filled_at) AND status = 'filled' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY pnl_dollars DESC

SELECT o.filled_at, o.ticker, o.direction, ROUND(o.limit_price::numeric, 3) AS limit_price, ROUND(o.fill_price::numeric, 3) AS fill_price, ROUND(s.model_prob::numeric, 3) AS model_prob, ROUND(((o.fill_price - o.limit_price) * 100)::numeric, 2) AS slip_cents, ROUND(o.latency_ms::numeric, 1) AS latency_ms, o.outcome, o.pnl_cents, ROUND(s.edge::numeric, 4) AS edge, ROUND(s.kelly_fraction::numeric, 4) AS kelly FROM orders o LEFT JOIN signals s ON o.signal_id = s.id WHERE o.status = 'filled' AND o.filled_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY o.filled_at DESC LIMIT 100
